nodes.label: YPR GEN. CONTRACTOR AND CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY INC
ELITE GENERAL CONTRACTOR AND DEVELOPMENT CORP
STO. CRISTO CONSTRUCTION & TRADING INC. (FOR: STO. CRISTO CONSTRUCTION & TRADING)
ST. GERRARD CONSTRUCTION GEN. CONTRACTOR & DEVELOPMENT CORP
ST. MATTHEW GEN. CONTRACTOR & DEVELOPMENT CORP
ROYAL CROWN MONARCH CONSTRUCTION & SUPPLIES CORP
GREAT PACIFIC BUILDERS AND GEN. CONTRACTOR INC
AMETHYST HORIZON BUILDERS AND GEN. CONTRACTOR AND DEVELOPMENT CORP
ALPHA & OMEGA GEN. CONTRACTOR & DEVELOPMENT CORP
Cezarah "Sarah" Discaya
nodes.role: Admitted owner/officer of nine construction firms (Senate testimony, Sept 1, 2025)
nodes.status: Firms' PCAB licenses revoked (Board Resolution 075, Sept 2025). AMLC froze accounts tied to the family (news-reported).

nodes.label: Pacifico "Curlee" Discaya
nodes.status: Firms' PCAB licenses revoked (Board Resolution 075, Sept 2025).

nodes.label: Elizaldy "Zaldy" Co
nodes.role: Resigned representative; linked to Sunwest, Inc.
nodes.status: Charged by the Ombudsman before the Sandiganbayan (graft, malversation), Nov 2025. Reported to have left the country; the Sandiganbayan archived the case in 2026 while he remained at large. Charges are allegations; case unresolved.

nodes.label: Eumir and Pamela Villanueva
nodes.role: Owners of Topnotch Catalyst Builders Inc.
nodes.status: Named on the DOJ immigration lookout bulletin (Sept 2025). A lookout order is not a charge, but an investigative step.

nodes.label: Lawrence R. Lubiano
nodes.role: President of Centerways Construction and Development Inc.
nodes.status: Reported as the top campaign donor of Senate President Chiz Escudero in 2022. The Comelec cleared both of election-finance liability; Escudero denied any role in the firm's deals. Not an allegation of wrongdoing.

nodes.label: Alex H. Abelido
nodes.status: Named on the DOJ immigration lookout bulletin (Sept 2025). A lookout order is not a charge, but an investigative step.

nodes.label: MG Samidan Construction (Samidan family)
nodes.status: Subpoenaed by the Senate Blue Ribbon Committee; submitted documents to the ICI. No charge filed as of mid-2026.

nodes.label: Mark Allan Arevalo
nodes.status: Firm perpetually disqualified by DPWH for ghost projects (Sept 2025).
